summary: Gmail Integration & Mobile Quote Button Testing Complete. All features verified: Overview tab shows 'Gmail' instead of 'SendGrid', Gmail tab UI shows connect button when not connected, quote send buttons work on mobile with touch-manipulation class, LeadDetail page shows Email History section, all backend Gmail endpoints working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test leads and quotes for testing email flow and send buttons
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gmail integration fully tested. Key findings: (1) /api/settings/integrations returns 'gmail' key (not 'sendgrid'), (2) Gmail tab in Integrations shows connect button when not connected, (3) Quote send buttons on QuotesList.js have touch-manipulation, py-3, select-none, cursor-pointer classes for proper mobile touch activation, (4) LeadDetail.js send buttons also have touch-manipulation class, (5) /api/emails/lead/{lead_id} returns email history, (6) Gmail OAuth flow is configured but requires actual Google account to test fully.

backend_endpoints./api/settings/integrations: PASS - Returns gmail key, not sendgrid
backend_endpoints./api/gmail/disconnect: PASS - Works even when not connected
backend_endpoints./api/emails/stats: PASS - Returns sent, received, followup counts
backend_endpoints./api/auth/google: PASS - Returns Google OAuth authorization URL
backend_endpoints./api/emails/lead/{lead_id}: PASS - Returns email history for lead
backend_endpoints./api/quotes/{quote_id}/send: PASS - Marks quote as sent, email_sent=false when Gmail not connected

frontend_ui.gmail_tab: PASS - Shows 'Connexion Gmail' with connect button when not connected
frontend_ui.quoteslist_send_button_mobile: PASS - Has touch-manipulation, py-3, active:bg-violet-800 classes
frontend_ui.leaddetail_emails_section: PASS - Shows 'Emails (0)' section with empty state

mobile_responsiveness.quotes_page_375px: PASS - Cards layout, send button clickable
mobile_responsiveness.lead_detail_375px: PASS - Responsive layout, send button clickable

gmail_integration_status.oauth_tested: Cannot test full OAuth flow - requires real Google account
